revision.comment: Created page with "My specialty is in neo-Shinto movements."
revision.text: My specialty is in neo-Shinto movements.
My specialty is in neo-Shinto movements and [[:Category:Japanese new religions|Japanese new religions]].

My specialty is in neo-Shinto movements and [[:Category:Japanese new religions|Japanese new religions]].
I contribute original content to Shinto Wiki.

My specialty is in neo-Shinto movements, [[:Category:Japanese new religions|Japanese new religions]], and the philosophy of [[:Category:Honda Chikaatsu|Honda Chikaatsu]].
I contribute original content to Shinto Wiki.

My specialty is in neo-Shinto movements, [[:Category:Japanese new religions|Japanese new religions]], and the philosophy of [[:Category:Honda Chikaatsu|Honda Chikaatsu]] (本田親徳).
I contribute original content to Shinto Wiki.

My specialties include neo-Shinto movements, [[:Category:Japanese new religions|Japanese new religions]], and the philosophy of [[:Category:Honda Chikaatsu|Honda Chikaatsu]] (本田親徳).
I contribute original content to Shinto Wiki.

My specialties include neo-Shinto movements, [[:Category:Japanese new religions|Japanese new religions]], and the philosophy of [[:Category:Honda Chikaatsu|Honda Chikaatsu]] (本田親徳).
I contribute original content to Shinto Wiki.
*[[Tenkei Mikyōsho]] *[[ほんみち概観]] *[[円応教教典]] *[[Tenrikyo Resource Wiki]] *[[Catechism of Tenrikyo]] *[[List of early Tenrikyo disciples]] *[[Roy Tetsuo Forbes]] *[[Onipedia]] *[[Heart Sutra (interlinear translation)]] *[[Reigakushō]] *[[Michi no Taigen]] *[[Shintō Montai]] *[[Hyakushu (Honda Chikaatsu)]] *[[御神書]] *[[Makoto no Michi]] *[[真の道]] *[[Seicho-No-Ie Holy Sutras]] *[[甘露の法雨]] *[[Nectarean Shower of Holy Doctrines]] *[[Shinsokan prayer]] *[[Michi no Hikari and the Bible]]

My specialties include neo-Shinto movements, [[:Category:Japanese new religions|Japanese new religions]], and the philosophy of [[:Category:Honda Chikaatsu|Honda Chikaatsu]] (本田親徳).
I contribute original content to Shinto Wiki.

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Yenistardom here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Yenistardom for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> My specialties include neo-Shinto movements, [[:Category:Japanese new religions|Japanese new religions]], and the philosophy of [[:Category:Honda Chikaatsu|Honda Chikaatsu]] (本田親徳).
I contribute original content to Shinto Wiki.
*[[Tenkei Mikyōsho]] *[[ほんみち概観]] *[[円応教教典]] *[[Tenrikyo Resource Wiki]] *[[Catechism of Tenrikyo]] *[[List of early Tenrikyo disciples]] *[[Roy Tetsuo Forbes]] *[[Onipedia]] *[[Heart Sutra (interlinear translation)]] *[[Reigakushō]] *[[Michi no Taigen]] *[[Shintō Montai]] *[[Hyakushu (Honda Chikaatsu)]] *[[御神書]] *[[Makoto no Michi]] *[[真の道]] *[[Seicho-No-Ie Holy Sutras]] *[[甘露の法雨]] *[[Nectarean Shower of Holy Doctrines]] *[[Shinsokan prayer]] *[[Michi no Hikari and the Bible]] *[[Zenki and Goki]] *[[36 Dōji]] *[[Tensokokyo]]
